name: Jove Eight
explanation: A lush eight-voice analog-style polyphonic synthesizer in the flagship-poly lineage. Each voice stacks TWO oscillators (a band-limited saw and a variable-width pulse with slow PWM) plus a sub-oscillator one octave down, spread by a subtle unison detune for the big stacked-string-pad character. The mixed oscillators feed a resonant 24 dB/oct low-pass driven by its own envelope (Cutoff, Env Amount, Resonance), then an amplitude envelope. Chords ring with independent contours. Controls: Cutoff, Resonance, Env Amount, PW, Detune, Attack, Release and Level.
